label: SPE (WS)
info:
WebSocket-based SPE flow.

Talks to the spe-remote Python server at ws://localhost:8888/ws
instead of holding /dev/ttyUSBx itself. This means:
 - Node-RED, the browser dashboard at http://<pi>:8888/, and
   MacExpert can all monitor and control the amp simultaneously.
 - No serial port contention, no exec/python power-on dance.
 - Server handles framing, checksum, wraparound recovery, RCU.

Nodes are wired to the same dashboard layout as the original flow,
so the SPE Panel UI Template + button router stay almost untouched —
only the I/O ends were swapped from serial to WebSocket.

name: ReadMe (WebSocket-based SPE)
info:
Replaces the original spe-flow's serial-port plumbing with a
WebSocket client to the spe-remote Python server.

Server protocol (text JSON over /ws):
  state      {model_id,op_status,tx_status,input,band,tx_antenna,
              p_level,p_out,swr,aswr,voltage,drain,
              pa_temp,pa_temp_lower,pa_temp_combiner,
              warnings,error}
  heartbeat  {heartbeat:true, serial:'up'|'down', clients:N, ts:...}
  power_res  {power_result:'power_on'|'power_off', status:'ok'|'error'}

Client -> server: bare command name as text, e.g. 'oper', 'tune',
'band_up', 'power_on', 'power_off' (full set in server's protocol.py).

Dashboard: a clone of the original SPE Panel UI Template, mounted in
a new dashboard group 'Amplifier (WS)' so it can coexist with the
original one. Reuses the same SPE GitHub CSS rules.

name: Parse + route
WS state -> Dashboard payload
WS heartbeat -> usb chip

name: Button -> WS command
func:
const map = {
  MODE: 'oper',
  TUNE: 'tune',
  INPUT: 'input',
  ANTENNA: 'antenna',
  PWRLVL: 'power_level',
  BL_ON: 'backlight_on',
  BL_OFF: 'backlight_off',
  L_MINUS: 'l_minus',
  L_PLUS: 'l_plus',
  C_MINUS: 'c_minus',
  C_PLUS: 'c_plus',
  LEFT: 'left',
  RIGHT: 'right',
  SET: 'set',
  DISPLAY: 'display',
  BAND_MINUS: 'band_dn',
  BAND_PLUS: 'band_up',
  OFF_SPE: 'power_off',
  ON_SPE: 'power_on'
};
const cmd = map[msg.payload];
if (!cmd) return null;
msg.payload = cmd;
return msg;

name: SPE GitHub CSS (WS)
format:
<style>
:root{
  --gh-bg:#0d1117;--gh-card:#161b22;--gh-border:#30363d;
  --gh-text:#c9d1d9;--gh-muted:#8b949e;
  --gh-green:#3fb950;--gh-red:#f85149;--gh-amber:#e3b341;--gh-blue:#58a6ff;
  --gh-font:'SFMono-Regular','Consolas',monospace;
  --gh-sans:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
}
.gh-card{background:var(--gh-card);border:1px solid var(--gh-border);border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;font-family:var(--gh-sans);color:var(--gh-text);}
.gh-sec{font-size:10px;color:var(--gh-muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:2px 0 5px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gh-border);margin-bottom:8px;}
.gh-lbl{font-size:9px;color:var(--gh-muted);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.gh-val{font-family:var(--gh-font);font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin-top:2px;}
.gh-box{background:#0d1117;border:1px solid var(--gh-border);border-radius:4px;padding:5px 7px;}
.gh-track{background:#21262d;border-radius:2px;height:6px;width:100%;}
.gh-fill{height:6px;border-radius:2px;}
.gh-badge{border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:10px;font-family:var(--gh-font);display:inline-block;margin-top:2px;border:1px solid;}
.gh-ok{background:#0d2818;border-color:var(--gh-green);color:var(--gh-green);}
.gh-err{background:#2d0808;border-color:var(--gh-red);color:var(--gh-red);}
.gh-inf{background:#0d1a2a;border-color:var(--gh-blue);color:var(--gh-blue);}
.gh-wrn{background:#2d1800;border-color:var(--gh-amber);color:var(--gh-amber);}
.gh-btn{border-radius:4px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:11px;font-family:var(--gh-font);cursor:pointer;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--gh-border);background:#0d1117;color:var(--gh-text);width:100%;transition:all 0.15s;}
.gh-btn:hover{border-color:var(--gh-blue);color:var(--gh-blue);}
.gh-btn-g{border-color:var(--gh-green);color:var(--gh-green);background:#0d2818;}
.gh-btn-r{border-color:var(--gh-red);color:var(--gh-red);background:#2d0808;}
.gh-btn-b{border-color:var(--gh-blue);color:var(--gh-blue);background:#0d1a2a;}
.gh-btn-a{border-color:var(--gh-amber);color:var(--gh-amber);background:#2d1800;}
.gh-exp-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;cursor:pointer;padding:6px 0;border-top:1px solid var(--gh-border);margin-top:8px;user-select:none;}
.gh-exp-hdr:hover .gh-exp-lbl{color:var(--gh-blue);}
.gh-exp-lbl{font-size:10px;color:var(--gh-muted);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.gh-exp-arr{font-size:10px;color:var(--gh-muted);transition:transform 0.2s;display:inline-block;}
.gh-exp-arr.open{transform:rotate(90deg);}
.gh-exp-body{overflow:hidden;max-height:0;transition:max-height 0.25s ease;}
.gh-exp-body.open{max-height:600px;padding-top:8px;}
</style>
